title: Artec Studio 17 tutorials 2/10 - Scanning procedure
author: Campanaro, Danilo Marco
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the second in a series of 10 video tutorials produced within the activities of the Swedish infrastructure for Digital Archaeology, Swedigarch. This tutorial focuses on the scanning procedure using Artec scanners, providing step-by-step guidance on how to capture high-quality 3D data.  The dataset used in this tutorial—including an Artec Studio project file, a 3D model in OBJ format, and a PDF with a specific print designed to enhance scan quality—can be downloaded from the first tutorial at  https://zenodo.org/uploads/15149591 .
